ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grain_types" (
  "grain_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grain type */,
  "grain_name" TEXT /* Name of the grain type (e.g., wheat, corn, soybeans) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grain type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grain type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grain type was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grain type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grain_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grain_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "grain_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grain type of the dataset */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the grain */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the grain */,
  "compactness" REAL /* Compactness of the grain */,
  "kernel_length" REAL /* Length of the kernel */,
  "kernel_width" REAL /* Width of the kernel */,
  "asymmetry_coefficient" REAL /* Asymmetry coefficient of the grain */,
  "groove_length" REAL /* Length of the groove */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., lab, field, external) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grain_datasets_grain_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("grain_type_id") REFERENCES grain_types ("grain_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grain_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., area, perimeter, compactness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute (e.g., mm, kg) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grain_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute the value represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the value was last updated */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grain_values_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES grain_attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grain_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES grain_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES grain_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grain_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number or identifier */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grain_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES grain_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grain_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grain_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private or public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grain_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES grain_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grain_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
